message.content:
{
  "layout": {
    "topSection": {
      "height": "10%",
      "content": "Header text and main lobby title"
    },
    "middleSection": {
      "height": "45%",
      "content": "Main lobby UI with character, mission card, and stats"
    },
    "bottomSection": {
      "height": "45%",
      "content": "Agents & Loadout panel with character details"
    },
    "leftSidebar": {
      "width": "5%",
      "position": "left",
      "content": "Navigation arrows"
    },
    "rightSidebar": {
      "width": "5%",
      "position": "right",
      "content": "Navigation arrows"
    }
  },
  "elements": {
    "header": {
      "position": "top-center",
      "text": "Sci-Fi Shooter Mobile Game - UX/UI Design",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "12px",
      "color": "#ffffff"
    },
    "mainLobbyTitle": {
      "position": "top-center",
      "text": "Main Lobby",
      "font": "bold sans-serif",
      "size": "18px",
      "color": "#ffffff"
    },
    "logicText": {
      "position": "top-center",
      "text": "Logic: Centralized character focus with key stats (Level/Power) placed directly above the Play button for instant combat readiness. UX: Streamlined navigation with a dedicated Mission Card for quick task overview and a stacked sidebar for core menu access.",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "10px",
      "color": "#a0a0a0"
    },
    "mainLobbyPanel": {
      "position": "middle-center",
      "width": "90%",
      "height": "80%",
      "background": "rgba(0, 20, 40, 0.8)",
      "borderRadius": "10px",
      "border": "1px solid #0066cc"
    },
    "backButton": {
      "position": "top-left",
      "width": "40px",
      "height": "40px",
      "background": "rgba(0, 50, 100, 0.5)",
      "borderRadius": "5px",
      "icon": "arrow-left"
    },
    "mainLobbyLabel": {
      "position": "top-center",
      "text": "MAIN LOBBY",
      "font": "bold sans-serif",
      "size": "14px",
      "color": "#00ccff"
    },
    "xpDisplay": {
      "position": "top-right",
      "text": "XP 663 778",
      "font": "bold sans-serif",
      "size": "14px",
      "color": "#00ff00"
    },
    "crDisplay": {
      "position": "top-right",
      "text": "CR 234 326",
      "font": "bold sans-serif",
      "size": "14px",
      "color": "#ffff00"
    },
    "settingsIcon": {
      "position": "top-right",
      "width": "30px",
      "height": "30px",
      "background": "rgba(0, 50, 100, 0.5)",
      "borderRadius": "5px",
      "icon": "gear"
    },
    "currentMissionTitle": {
      "position": "top-left",
      "text": "CURRENT MISSION",
      "font": "bold sans-serif",
      "size": "18px",
      "color": "#ffffff"
    },
    "missionCard": {
      "position": "top-left",
      "width": "180px",
      "height": "100px",
      "background": "rgba(0, 30, 60, 0.7)",
      "borderRadius": "5px",
      "border": "1px solid #0066cc"
    },
    "missionType": {
      "position": "top-left",
      "text": "MISSION TYPE: EXTRACTION",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "10px",
      "color": "#00ccff"
    },
    "operationName": {
      "position": "top-left",
      "text": "OPERATION: SHADOW FALL",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "10px",
      "color": "#ffffff"
    },
    "xpReward": {
      "position": "top-right",
      "text": "XP 15K",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "10px",
      "color": "#00ff00"
    },
    "crReward": {
      "position": "top-right",
      "text": "CR 27K",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "10px",
      "color": "#ffff00"
    },
    "characterRender": {
      "position": "center",
      "width": "200px",
      "height": "250px",
      "image": "Vulcan character in futuristic armor"
    },
    "classTitle": {
      "position": "top-right",
      "text": "CLASS: TANK",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "10px",
      "color": "#00ccff"
    },
    "characterName": {
      "position": "top-right",
      "text": "VULCAN",
      "font": "bold sans-serif",
      "size": "20px",
      "color": "#ffffff"
    },
    "levelDisplay": {
      "position": "top-right",
      "text": "LEVEL 47",
      "font": "bold sans-serif",
      "size": "16px",
      "color": "#00ff00"
    },
    "powerScoreLabel": {
      "position": "top-right",
      "text": "POWER SCORE",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "10px",
      "color": "#a0a0a0"
    },
    "powerScoreValue": {
      "position": "top-right",
      "text": "2500",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "10px",
      "color": "#ffffff"
    },
    "powerScoreBar": {
      "position": "top-right",
      "width": "120px",
      "height": "5px",
      "background": "rgba(0, 100, 200, 0.3)",
      "borderRadius": "2px",
      "fill": "#00ccff"
    },
    "missionsButton": {
      "position": "bottom-left",
      "width": "120px",
      "height": "40px",
      "background": "rgba(0, 30, 60, 0.7)",
      "borderRadius": "5px",
      "text": "MISSIONS",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "12px",
      "color": "#ffffff"
    },
    "loadoutButton": {
      "position": "bottom-left",
      "width": "120px",
      "height": "40px",
      "background": "rgba(0, 30, 60, 0.7)",
      "borderRadius": "5px",
      "text": "LOADOUT",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "12px",
      "color": "#ffffff"
    },
    "shopButton": {
      "position": "bottom-left",
      "width": "120px",
      "height": "40px",
      "background": "rgba(0, 30, 60, 0.7)",
      "borderRadius": "5px",
      "text": "SHOP",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "12px",
      "color": "#ffffff"
    },
    "playButton": {
      "position": "bottom-right",
      "width": "150px",
      "height": "50px",
      "background": "#00ccff",
      "borderRadius": "10px",
      "text": "PLAY",
      "font": "bold sans-serif",
      "size": "18px",
      "color": "#000000"
    },
    "agentsPanel": {
      "position": "bottom-center",
      "width": "90%",
      "height": "80%",
      "background": "rgba(0, 20, 40, 0.8)",
      "borderRadius": "10px",
      "border": "1px solid #0066cc"
    },
    "agentsBackButton": {
      "position": "top-left",
      "width": "40px",
      "height": "40px",
      "background": "rgba(0, 50, 100, 0.5)",
      "borderRadius": "5px",
      "icon": "arrow-left"
    },
    "agentsTabs": {
      "position": "top-center",
      "tabs": ["AGENTS", "PRIMARY", "SECONDARY", "TACTICAL"],
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "12px",
      "color": "#a0a0a0",
      "activeColor": "#00ccff"
    },
    "saveButton": {
      "position": "top-right",
      "width": "80px",
      "height": "30px",
      "background": "#00ccff",
      "borderRadius": "5px",
      "text": "SAVE",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "12px",
      "color": "#000000"
    },
    "agentName": {
      "position": "top-left",
      "text": "VULCAN",
      "font": "bold sans-serif",
      "size": "18px",
      "color": "#ffffff"
    },
    "agentDescription": {
      "position": "top-left",
      "text": "Heavy suppression operative. The use of experimental alloys has pushed Vulcan's defense to the absolute limit at the cost of maneuverability. Motto: The Wall Never Retreats.",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "10px",
      "color": "#a0a0a0"
    },
    "fullViewButton": {
      "position": "top-left",
      "width": "80px",
      "height": "30px",
      "background": "rgba(0, 50, 100, 0.5)",
      "borderRadius": "5px",
      "text": "FULL VIEW",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "10px",
      "color": "#00ccff"
    },
    "agentRender": {
      "position": "center-left",
      "width": "150px",
      "height": "200px",
      "image": "Vulcan character in futuristic armor"
    },
    "statsPanel": {
      "position": "center-right",
      "width": "150px",
      "height": "200px",
      "background": "rgba(0, 30, 60, 0.7)",
      "borderRadius": "5px"
    },
    "powerScoreLabel": {
      "position": "top-center",
      "text": "POWER SCORE",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "10px",
      "color": "#a0a0a0"
    },
    "powerScoreValue": {
      "position": "top-center",
      "text": "2500",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "10px",
      "color": "#ffffff"
    },
    "powerScoreBar": {
      "position": "top-center",
      "width": "120px",
      "height": "5px",
      "background": "rgba(0, 100, 200, 0.3)",
      "borderRadius": "2px",
      "fill": "#00ccff"
    },
    "healthLabel": {
      "position": "top-center",
      "text": "HEALTH",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "10px",
      "color": "#a0a0a0"
    },
    "healthValue": {
      "position": "top-center",
      "text": "5000",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "10px",
      "color": "#ffffff"
    },
    "healthBar": {
      "position": "top-center",
      "width": "120px",
      "height": "5px",
      "background": "rgba(0, 100, 200, 0.3)",
      "borderRadius": "2px",
      "fill": "#00ff00"
    },
    "shieldLabel": {
      "position": "top-center",
      "text": "SHIELD",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "10px",
      "color": "#a0a0a0"
    },
    "shieldValue": {
      "position": "top-center",
      "text": "2500",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "10px",
      "color": "#ffffff"
    },
    "shieldBar": {
      "position": "top-center",
      "width": "120px",
      "height": "5px",
      "background": "rgba(0, 100, 200, 0.3)",
      "borderRadius": "2px",
      "fill": "#00ccff"
    },
    "speedLabel": {
      "position": "top-center",
      "text": "SPEED",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "10px",
      "color": "#a0a0a0"
    },
    "speedValue": {
      "position": "top-center",
      "text": "50%",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "10px",
      "color": "#ffffff"
    },
    "speedBar": {
      "position": "top-center",
      "width": "120px",
      "height": "5px",
      "background": "rgba(0, 100, 200, 0.3)",
      "borderRadius": "2px",
      "fill": "#ff6600"
    },
    "agentsLoadoutTitle": {
      "position": "bottom-right",
      "text": "Agents & Loadout",
      "font": "bold sans-serif",
      "size": "16px",
      "color": "#ffffff"
    },
    "agentsLoadoutDescription": {
      "position": "bottom-right",
      "text": "Logic: Segmented progress bars enable instant recognition of character/weapon archetypes. Visual weight serves as the primary indicator of balance within the game ecosystem.",
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "10px",
      "color": "#a0a0a0"
    }
  },
  "colors": {
    "background": "#000000",
    "panelBackground": "rgba(0, 20, 40, 0.8)",
    "panelBorder": "#0066cc",
    "textPrimary": "#ffffff",
    "textSecondary": "#a0a0a0",
    "accent": "#00ccff",
    "accentSecondary": "#00ff00",
    "accentTertiary": "#ffff00",
    "buttonPrimary": "#00ccff",
    "buttonSecondary": "rgba(0, 30, 60, 0.7)",
    "progressBarFill": "#00ccff",
    "healthBarFill": "#00ff00",
    "shieldBarFill": "#00ccff",
    "speedBarFill": "#ff6600",
    "missionCardBackground": "rgba(0, 30, 60, 0.7)"
  },
  "typography": {
    "header": {
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "12px",
      "weight": "normal",
      "color": "#ffffff"
    },
    "title": {
      "font": "bold sans-serif",
      "size": "18px",
      "weight": "bold",
      "color": "#ffffff"
    },
    "subtitle": {
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "14px",
      "weight": "normal",
      "color": "#00ccff"
    },
    "body": {
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "10px",
      "weight": "normal",
      "color": "#a0a0a0"
    },
    "button": {
      "font": "sans-serif",
      "size": "12px",
      "weight": "normal",
      "color": "#ffffff"
    },
    "buttonPrimary": {
      "font": "bold sans-serif",
      "size": "18px",
      "weight": "bold",
      "color": "#000000"
    }
  },
  "characters": {
    "vulcan": {
      "position": "center",
      "width": "200px",
      "height": "250px",
      "description": "Futuristic armored character with glowing blue accents, holding a large weapon"
    },
    "vulcanAgent": {
      "position": "center-left",
      "width": "150px",
      "height": "200px",
      "description": "Futuristic armored character with glowing blue accents, holding a large weapon"
    }
  },
  "buttons": {
    "back": {
      "shape": "square",
      "size": "40x40px",
      "style": "transparent with border",
      "color": "rgba(0, 50, 100, 0.5)",
      "borderColor": "#0066cc",
      "borderRadius": "5px"
    },
    "settings": {
      "shape": "square",
      "size": "30x30px",
      "style": "transparent with border",
      "color": "rgba(0, 50, 100, 0.5)",
      "borderColor": "#0066cc",
      "borderRadius": "5px"
    },
    "missions": {
      "shape": "rectangle",
      "size": "120x40px",
      "style": "transparent with border",
      "color": "rgba(0, 30, 60, 0.7)",
      "borderColor": "#0066cc",
      "borderRadius": "5px"
    },
    "loadout": {
      "shape": "rectangle",
      "size": "120x40px",
      "style": "transparent with border",
      "color": "rgba(0, 30, 60, 0.7)",
      "borderColor": "#0066cc",
      "borderRadius": "5px"
    },
    "shop": {
      "shape": "rectangle",
      "size": "120x40px",
      "style": "transparent with border",
      "color": "rgba(0, 30, 60, 0.7)",
      "borderColor": "#0066cc",
      "borderRadius": "5px"
    },
    "play": {
      "shape": "rectangle",
      "size": "150x50px",
      "style": "solid fill",
      "color": "#00ccff",
      "borderRadius": "10px"
    },
    "save": {
      "shape": "rectangle",
      "size": "80x30px",
      "style": "solid fill",
      "color": "#00ccff",
      "borderRadius": "5px"
    },
    "fullView": {
      "shape": "rectangle",
      "size": "80x30px",
      "style": "transparent with border",
      "color": "rgba(0, 50, 100, 0.5)",
      "borderColor": "#0066cc",
      "borderRadius": "5px"
    }
  },
  "icons": {
    "back": {
      "type": "arrow-left",
      "color": "#ffffff",
      "size": "20px"
    },
    "settings": {
      "type": "gear",
      "color": "#ffffff",
      "size": "20px"
    },
    "fullView": {
      "type": "eye",
      "color": "#00ccff",
      "size": "16px"
    }
  }
}
